description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge on the left side, upholstered in a dark, solid-colored fabric. The sofa features three large, rectangular back cushions and a single, continuous seat cushion that extends across both the main seating area and the chaise. The armrests are straight, padded, and of equal height to the backrest, providing a clean, boxy silhouette. The legs are short and blocky, mostly hidden beneath the base, giving the sofa a grounded appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. This piece is designed for comfort and functionality, suitable for urban living rooms, lounges, or waiting areas.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, dark solid upholstery, and straight padded armrests. Features three large back cushions and a single seat cushion for a clean, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the L-shaped layout, three back cushions, and the chaise lounge extending to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight, padded armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the sofa's boxy, uniform shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right armrest and the end of the chaise lounge.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform, rectangular back cushions and a single continuous seat cushion; all cushions appear attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests of equal height to the backrest, with a boxy, modern profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, mostly recessed and hidden from view, likely made of wood or plastic.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached rectangular cushions, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
